description:
🕒 09:30–14:40

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/tanetsuti-1-2/

Schedule change: The tour originally planned for June 21 (Sunday) has been rescheduled to June 28 (Sunday) at the organizer's request.

Learn to build and plant in a "kinoko-chan field" (a garden method using fallen leaves and branches). Our advisor will teach you hands-on tips on how to plant seedlings and care for them using the kinoko-chan farming method. Lunch will be served at the restaurant "La Nolla," where you'll enjoy Italian cuisine made with kinoko-chan vegetables.

【Fee】Adults 8,800 yen, middle school students and younger 2,200 yen (includes guide, lunch, materials, insurance)

【Capacity】15 people

【Guide】Hanno Tanetotsuchinouen Farm staff

【What to bring】Drinks, hat, towel, gloves, etc.
location: 集合 ラ・ノーラ前の畑 （飯能市下加治243-25、イーグルバス「飯能靖和病院」下車徒歩8分）
summary: Experience kinoko-chan (fungi-based) farming and summer vegetable planting in Hanno's forests
